src: Apache BifroMQ (Incubating) is a high-performance, distributed MQTT broker that natively supports multi-tenancy. It is designed to enable the building of large-scale IoT device connectivity and messaging systems.
ja: [49] Apache BifroMQ (Incubating) はマルチテナンシーをネイティブサポートする高性能分散MQTTブローカー。大規模IoTデバイス接続およびメッセージングシステム構築を実現
